news.t: AdvisorShares Launches Gerber Kawasaki ETF (Ticker: GK), Actively Managed by Ross Gerber

holdings.infoBox: GK is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 10.43%, Alphabet at 8.97%, NVIDIA at 7.26%, Eli Lilly and Company at 7.12%, and Broadcom at 5.44%.

overview.description: The AdvisorShares Gerber Kawasaki ETF (GK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund that offers exposure to a portfolio of US growth stocks across multiple investment themes believed to represent top thematic macro opportunities. GK was launched on Jul 2, 2021 and is issued by AdvisorShares.
